stemHtml:
Which degree of aircraft turbulence is determined by the following ICAO description?

"Conditions in which abrupt changes in aircraft attitude and/or altitude occur aircraft may be out of control for short periods. Usually, large variations in air speed. Changes in accelerometer readings greater than 1.0 g at the aircraft`s centre of gravity. Occupants are forced violently against seat belts. Loose objects are tossed about."
